message:
refactor(codegen): Add emitFmtConst helpers to tokenizer, sysconfig, html

Continue standardizing helper functions across codegen modules:
- tokenizer_mod.zig: handleEncode, handleDecode
- sysconfig_mod.zig: genGetConfigVar, genGetPath
- html_mod.zig: genEscape, genUnescape

Total ~50 more lines of boilerplate reduced.
